Events automation session (TC_EV_001–TC_EV_009) — full chat summary:

PROJECT SETUP:
- Playwright automation bot with MCP approach (bot.ts ignored).
- Codebase cloned under codebase/frontend and codebase/backend for context.
- Test cases provided as Excel (.xlsx) in test-cases/ folder.
- Excel file: test-cases/RegressionTest Cases - All Modules.xlsx, sheet "Events Re-modified".
- Shared memory repo: aravind936/playwright-bot-memory (GITHUB_REPO must NOT have leading slash).

ENVIRONMENT:
- Base URL: https://dev-09.almabase-beta.com/sadmin (changed from dev-08 per user request).
- Login credentials: admin3 / admin3.
- Config in config.json; playwright.config.ts uses 240s test timeout, 30s action timeout, 15s expect timeout, slowMo 500.

TESTS CREATED:
- tests/events/events-listing-first-9.spec.ts — serial suite for TC_EV_001 through TC_EV_009.
- tests/helpers/events.ts — shared navigation, filter, table, and editor helpers.

TEST CASE STATUS:
- TC_EV_001: Edit old event (not in recents), verify in recently updated bar, restore name — PASSING.
- TC_EV_002: Status filter buttons (All, Accepting registrations, Draft, Completed, Archived) — PASSING.
- TC_EV_003: Apply Open/Moderated/Invite only filters one-by-one; open first event; verify registration type in editor — PASSING.
- TC_EV_004–009: Clear filters, archive, unarchive, duplicate, delete, recents on create — written, not all verified in full suite.

KEY USER REFINEMENTS:
- TC_EV_001 must use an event NOT already in the recents bar.
- TC_EV_003: select registration type filters one at a time; after each filter, open any one event and verify its registration type matches in the event editor (not just API/table check).
- User asked to save all chat context to shared memory.

OTHER WORK IN SESSION:
- Fixed missing @playwright/test and @anthropic-ai/sdk dependencies.
- Created login, forms create/submit automation scripts.
- Set up test-cases folder, codebase context loading, excel-driven generation.
- Fixed memory.ts GitHubApiError so failed writes no longer report false success.
- Fixed GITHUB_REPO env var (remove leading slash for API calls).
Correction saved: "Event name links in events listing open in a new tab (target=_blank). Use page.goto(href) instead of click." (context: Events listing — openEventFromTable)

Correction saved: "Events listing status filters (All, Accepting registrations, Draft, Completed, Archived) are buttons, not tabs. Use getByRole('button') scoped to .events-listing-table." (context: Events listing — TC_EV_002 status filters)
Correction saved: "Scope all events table interactions to .events-listing-table to avoid strict mode violations from other page links." (context: Events listing — general selectors)

Correction saved: "Filters modal selector is .events-listing-filter:visible; apply button is .apply-filters-btn (not role dialog or 'Apply filters' button name in all builds)." (context: Events listing — filters modal)

Correction saved: "Registration type filter checkboxes are named exactly: Open, Moderated, Invite only. Use getByRole('checkbox', { name, exact: true })." (context: Events listing — filters modal registration type)

Correction saved: "Tags dropdown in filters modal: click .ant-select-selector inside the Tags form item, not getByLabel('Tags') — placeholder intercepts clicks." (context: Events listing — filters modal tags)
Correction saved: "Do not press Escape to close tag dropdown — it dismisses the entire filters modal. Click elsewhere in modal instead." (context: Events listing — filters modal tags)
Correction saved: "Row Actions menu: hover the Actions text in the row, then click the item in .events-listing-action-dropdown." (context: Events listing — archive/unarchive/duplicate/delete)

Correction saved: "To verify registration type in event editor: use getByRole('combobox', { name: 'How would you like to manage registrations?' }) and assert .ant-select-selection-item text. Do NOT use #event-admin-form-container or .ant-form-item hasText." (context: Events editor — TC_EV_003 registration type verification)
Correction saved: "Filter label 'Invite only' maps to editor dropdown value 'Invite-only' (with hyphen)." (context: Events — registration type label mapping)

Correction saved: "TC_EV_001: pick an event from the table that is NOT in the recently updated bar, edit its name, save, verify it appears in recents, then restore the original name." (context: Events listing — TC_EV_001 recently updated)
Correction saved: "GITHUB_REPO env var must be owner/repo without leading slash (e.g. aravind936/playwright-bot-memory) or GitHub API returns 404." (context: Shared memory — memory.ts GitHub config)
Product knowledge saved: [Events Listing] "Events admin listing URL path: /admin/events. Table container class: .events-listing-table. Event links: a[href*='/admin/eventsx/']."
Product knowledge saved: [Events Listing] "Registration type API filter uses type__in query param. Values: Open=1, Moderated=2, Invite only=3."
Product knowledge saved: [Events Editor] "Event editor Settings tab has registration type field labeled 'How would you like to manage registrations?' with options Open, Moderated, Invite-only."
Product knowledge saved: [Events Listing] "TC_EV_003 flow: for each registration type filter, clear filters, check one type, apply, open first table event, verify type in editor, return to listing."
Product knowledge saved: [Config] "Test environment URL is https://dev-09.almabase-beta.com/sadmin. Login: admin3/admin3."
